Your current balance: §a{balance}§r
Please select an action:
eco.transfer.title: Transfer Center
eco.transfer.desc:
Select a payee and enter the amount.
The system will charge a §c{tax}%§r tax.
eco.transfer.invalid: Invalid amount. Please enter a valid positive integer!
eco.transfer.insufficient: Transfer failed: Insufficient balance. Total cost including taxes: {cost} coins.

eco.transfer.success.target: You received a transfer of {amount} coins from {name}!

eco.transfer.fail: System Error: Failed to deduct funds!
eco.transfer.offline_search_hint: --- Use the search box below for offline players ---

eco.transfer.search_tooshort: §cSearch term too short! Enter at least {min} characters to prevent accidents.
eco.transfer.select.title: Select Transfer Target
eco.transfer.select.desc: Multiple matches found. Click to select the exact payee:
eco.transfer.err.noselect: §cError: Please select a valid online player from the list, or type an offline player's name below!
eco.transfer.confirm.title: Transfer Final Confirmation
eco.transfer.offline_pending: §eThe target player is offline. The funds have been queued and will be delivered upon their next login.

Append following arguments dynamically?

cuscmd.err.alias_invalid: §cRegistration failed: Invalid alias! Must contain only lowercase letters and numbers.
cuscmd.err.alias_num: §cRegistration failed: Alias cannot be pure numbers!
cuscmd.err.target_empty: §cRegistration failed: Target command cannot be empty!
cuscmd.err.admin_only: §cRegistration failed: High-risk permission blocked! You must be a Super Admin to create a Console-level mapping.
cuscmd.err.exists: §cRegistration failed: This custom command mapping already exists!
cuscmd.success.create: §aCustom command bridge /{cmd} created and applied successfully!
cuscmd.err.conflict: §cCommand launch failed: This command identifier is already taken by the game or another plugin.
cuscmd.del.none: §cNo custom commands available in the environment.

Select the command to revoke:
(Warning: Invalidation is immediate, but autocomplete hints require a server restart to disappear)
